prompt: Ultra-realistic luxury commercial product photography of a premium transparent water bottle standing upright on a glossy reflective surface. The bottle is covered with tiny cold water droplets, symbolizing freshness. A dramatic splash of crystal-clear water wraps around the bottle in a dynamic spiral. Background features cool icy blue gradients with soft white lighting, floating ice cubes, light mist, and subtle glowing particles. High-end studio lighting with cinematic rim light, premium advertising style, sharp focus, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, clean composition, luxury beverage campaign, minimalistic yet eye-catching, plenty of copy space for branding and text.
